## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between fwd.digital and FunnelEnvy/Reform for content strategy and organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [FunnelEnvy has two brands: FunnelEnvy (services) and Reform (form builder app), each with different content objectives](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [fwd.digital recommends focusing on Reform.app for content strategy due to higher domain authority and potential for frontend-to-backend offer conversion](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Collaboration could involve leveraging FunnelEnvy's expertise in playbooks and conversion optimization with fwd.digital's content creation and distribution capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [A 90-day pilot program is available to test the partnership and align expectations](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)

## Topics

### FunnelEnvy/Reform Business Overview

  - [FunnelEnvy: B2B services business focused on funnel optimization, CRO, marketing ops, and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Reform: Form builder app acquired and repositioned for B2B market](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Goal: Drive customers to Reform and potentially convert them to FunnelEnvy services](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Current content strategy: Using AI for blog content generation, but seeking more comprehensive approach](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)

### fwd.digital's Content Strategy Approach

  - [Comprehensive content strategy including audience analysis, topic clustering, and content production](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [Use of AI-powered workflows with human editors in the loop for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Focus on SEO-driven content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Capability to handle programmatic content creation for scale (e.g., location-based content)](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

### Proposed Collaboration Strategy

  - [Focus on Reform.app as the primary content target due to higher domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Leverage Reform as a frontend offer to attract leads for FunnelEnvy's backend services](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Potential to repurpose FunnelEnvy's playbooks into newsletter content or enriched blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [Opportunity to create programmatic content around conversion rate optimization topics](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)

### fwd.digital's Team and Expertise

  - [Strategists with growth and content experience (e.g., former Head of Growth from Home Base)](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
  - [Managing editors with backgrounds from major SEO/content platforms (e.g., SEMRush, AHrefs)](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
  - [Pool of vetted freelancers for additional support as needed](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=1853.0)

### Engagement Model and Next Steps

  - [90-day pilot program with option to opt-out](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
  - [Focus on aligning expectations and demonstrating quality content production in the initial phase](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)
  - [Next available kickoff date: February 3rd](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)
  - [Marcel to send Slack invite, sample SOW, and additional details via email](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send Slack invite, recording, sample SOW, and availability details](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
  - [Arun and team to review proposal and discuss internally](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=2026.0)
  - [Potential kickoff on February 3rd if FunnelEnvy decides to proceed](https://fathom.video/share/wshgMZMkL8Tzs5-dUBsxyfFezzTjaYa1?tab=summary&timestamp=2037.0)
